reference: I have a Boxer cross that answered the door with raised hackles, and something happened to her. She fell down on her side, arched her back as if stretching, shook a little, and passed out, urinating on the floor. I waited until she started to come around, and then I carried her to a more comfortable place. This is the first time she has done anything like this. She is twelve years old.
text: I have a boxer cross that answered the door with rings tackles, and something happened to her. She fell down on her side, arched her back as if stretching, shook a little, and passed out, urinating on the floor. I waited until she started to come around, and then I carried her to a more comfortable place. This is the first time she has done anything like this; she is 12 years old.
